business_definition: Parts with no shortage divided by active demand parts.
PO lines received on time and in full divided by closed PO lines.
Open PO value where receipt is more than three days past promise.
Shortage units multiplied by unit cost for active program demand.
Trailing demand value divided by average inventory value.
Inventory value above demand plus safety stock thresholds.
Supplier quality events divided by PO lines.
Successful reporting refreshes completed by SLA.
